import React from "react"; import { useTranslation } from "./theme/TranslationContext"; import "./Landing.css"; const Landing = ({ onGetStarted }) => { const { t } = useTranslation(); return (

{t('welcome')}

{t('subtitle')}

); }; export default Landing;
